items.title: When we go from GPT-5.0 -> GPT-5.1 -> ...
items.description: When we go from GPT-5.0 -> GPT-5.1 -> ... -> GPT-5.5, the number incrementing goes with improvements in capabilities and token efficiency (which translates to speed gains). With GPT-5.5 our best model yet. A simple strategy that w…
items.description_zh: 当我们从 GPT-5.0 -> GPT-5.1 -> ... -> GPT-5.5 时，数字的增加伴随着功能和令牌效率的改进（这转化为速度的提升）。 GPT-5.5 是我们迄今为止最好的模型。一个简单的策略...

items.description: Again, maybe counterintuitive, but in the majority of conversations I have with CIOs, CTOs, and CEOs in large enterprises, they are either growing due to AI (in new job functions like FDEs, engineering, etc.) or at a minimum reinvesting ef…
items.description_zh: 再说一次，这也许违反直觉，但在我与大型企业的 CIO、CTO 和 CEO 进行的大多数对话中，他们要么因人工智能而成长（在 FDE、工程等新工作职能中），要么至少对精力进行再投资……
